lane.title: 10 Packaging Design
lane.last_summary: Initialized lane from live memory, packaging prompt, unified control graph, packaging Claude digest, HE Cheap-Bold doctrine, NCH flask Codex handoff, and local asset state. Packaging scope remains creative/vendor handoff only. HE current open work is corrected Cheap-Bold v2 renders: heritage burgundy direct-print pouches, kraft single-burgundy boxes/sleeves, unchanged cups with small lid sticker, tote as large brand surface; no foil/gold/emboss/photo-print/premium traps. NCH flask current open work is panel-by-panel continuation from approved front/back references and Downloads/_flask_bg locked bases; April automated vendor pack remains rejected, and final output must not use bulk SVG visible-art automation or generative panels.
lane.next_action: When Nihaf gives the target, either regenerate one HE Cheap-Bold corrected render/state at a time, or continue NCH flask one approved panel at a time. For NCH, first confirm legal text/phone/FSSAI/ingredients and the /go/flask QR redirect before print handoff; use rsvg-convert/Python only for dieline, QR, bleed, and PDF assembly.
lane.mutation_status: No artwork, Odoo, ad, WABA, aggregator, vendor, or customer-facing packaging mutation. Only packaging-design execution memory was updated and synced to ops/marketing-control/state.json.
